narrative:
Beaver (precinct in Noble County) has 355 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.1 percentage points.
